ReThinking: Explaining the Dun… - Worklife with Molly Graham - Apple Podcasts {"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"PodcastEpisode","productionCompany":"TED","datePublished":"2024-07-16","description":"The Dunning-Kruger effect is a rare psychological concept that has achieved pop culture fame.","duration":"PT37M51S","genre":["Management"],"name":"ReThinking: Explaining the Dunning-Kruger effect and overcoming overconfidence with David Dunning","offers":[{"@type":"Offer","category":"free","price":0}],"potentialAction":{"@type":"ListenAction","expectsAcceptanceOf":{"@type":"Offer","category":"free"},"target":{"@type":"EntryPoint","actionPlatform":"https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/rethinking-explaining-the-dunning-kruger-effect/id1346314086?i=1000661578914"}},"url":"https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/rethinking-explaining-the-dunning-kruger-effect/id1346314086?i=1000661578914","partOfSeries":{"@type":"CreativeWorkSeries","name":"Worklife with Molly Graham","url":"https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/worklife-with-molly-graham/id1346314086","offers":[{"@type":"Offer","category":"free","price":0}]},"thumbnailUrl":"https://is1-ssl.mzstatic.com/image/thumb/Podcasts221/v4/0b/45/46/0b454681-7a74-b836-7d51-a5714d30a82f/mza_8691989845156180670.jpeg/1200x1200bf.webp"} Search Home New Top Charts Search July 16, 202438 min ReThinking: Explaining the Dunning-Kruger effect and overcoming overconfidence with David Dunning Worklife with Molly Graham Play The Dunning-Kruger effect is a rare psychological concept that has achieved pop culture fame. David Dunning -- the lead author and one of the world’s most-cited psychologists -- joins Adam to discuss his famous findings about the arrogance of ignorance, the challenges of knowing what you don’t know, and the dangers of “doing your own research.” Then David and Adam uncover strategies for overcoming overconfidence among amateurs as well as experts.Transcripts for ReThinking are available at go.ted.com/RWAGscripts For the full text transcript, visit https://www.ted.com/podcasts/worklife-transcripts Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information. Episode Webpage Hosts & Guests Molly Graham Host DD David Dunning Guest Information Show Worklife with Molly Graham Channel TED Audio Collective Frequency Updated Weekly Published July 16, 2024 at
